raw_response_text:
<features>
- petal color: pink
- petal shape: large, broad, somewhat oval
- flower structure: large single blooms on woody branches
</features>

<kb>
- IF [petal color = white OR pink AND petal shape = large/broad AND flower structure = large blooms on woody branches] THEN [86]
- IF [petal color = white/purple/yellow/red AND petal shape = spurred/complex AND flower structure = small complex blooms] THEN [83]
- IF [petal color = pink/red AND petal shape = large/rounded AND flower structure = large single bloom with central stamen protrusion] THEN [82]
- IF [petal color = pink/white/red AND petal shape = pointed bracts surrounding a large central dome] THEN [12]
</kb>

<rule_check>
- The rule for class 86 fires because the image shows large, broad pink petals on woody branches, matching the pattern seen in the Magnolia examples.
</rule_check>

<response>86</response>
